headline: Ford wins J.D. Power's top spot, CEO calls it a 'breathtaking achievement'
summary: J.D. Power named Ford (F) the top mainstream brand in its 2026 US Initial Quality Study, the first time that the American automaker reached number one in 16 years. Ford CEO Jim Farley sits down with Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian to explain why this accomplishment was four years in the making for the car manufacturer.

headline: Ford CEO on JD Power win: This 'overnight success' was actually 4 years in the making
summary: Ford (F) was named the top mainstream brand in JD Power's 2026 US Initial Quality Study — the industry standard for vehicle quality rankings — for the first time in 16 years.

headline: Ford Recalls Continue to Cripple Brand
summary: Ford (NYSE: F) recalls this year have topped 1.2 million vehicles. While its poor 2006 track record is not nearly as bad as last year’s, the company’s quality promise has fallen apart again. And, while moves into battery technology have lifted the stock, there is reason for investors to be worried. Ford can’t get its ... Ford Recalls Continue to Cripple Brand

headline: EV Stocks Split: GM and Ford Draw Value Investors as Pure-Play Names Keep Bleeding
summary: The EV sector is splitting: legacy automakers like GM and Ford offer strong value with low P/E ratios and cash flow, while pure-play EV makers like NIO and Li Auto struggle with profitability and high valuations.

raw.headline: EV Stocks Split: GM and Ford Draw Value Investors as Pure-Play Names Keep Bleeding
raw.summary: The EV sector is splitting: legacy automakers like GM and Ford offer strong value with low P/E ratios and cash flow, while pure-play EV makers like NIO and Li Auto struggle with profitability and high valuations.

headline: Ford Named Top Mainstream Brand for New Vehicle Quality in JD Power 2026 U.S. Initial Quality Study for First Time Since 2010
summary: DEARBORN, Mich., June 25, 2026--Ford today became the new gold standard for mass market new vehicle quality in America, ranking as the top mainstream brand in the closely watched JD Power 2026 U.S. Initial Quality Study (IQS) – an achievement 16 years in the making.
